image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder why you sweat? It's your body's secret weapon against heat.
Context visual: When your body heats up, it triggers sweat glands to release moisture onto your skin.
Escalation visual: But here's the twist: that sweat doesn't cool you directly.
Evidence visual: It's all about evaporation. As sweat evaporates, it takes heat away from your skin.
Payoff visual: This process is called evaporative cooling, and it keeps your body temperature just right.
Cta visual: Next time you sweat, remember: it's your body’s way of keeping cool. Tap to learn more about your amazing biology!
